india_trends.title: Silver rate today steady as dollar strengthens, oil surges ahead of US Fed meet: Target level ahead?
india_trends.summary: Silver rates remained steady on April 28 as investors awaited clarity on U.S.-Iran peace talks and central bank decisions. MCX silver fell 0.5% to ₹2,40,490 per kg, while gold prices were flat. Geopolitical tensions and inflation concerns influenced market dynamics.

india_trends.title: Beauty brand WishCare in early talks to sell majority stake at ₹3,000 crore valuation
india_trends.summary: Kolkata-based beauty brand WishCare has appointed O3 Capital to explore a majority stake sale at a ₹3,000–3,500 crore valuation, amid rising strategic interest in India’s premium D2C beauty space.

india_trends.title: Three consumer stocks where FIIs increased stake in March quarter
india_trends.summary: Rising FII ownership can indicate investor confidence and attract market participation. However, it should not be the sole consideration for equity investment. Investors should also assess valuations, earnings growth, debt, promoter quality, sector outlook, cash flow, and competitive strength.

india_trends.title: Trent shares in focus as Zudio-parent sets record date for 1:2 bonus issue. Check details
india_trends.summary: Trent, a Tata Group firm, announced its maiden bonus issue of one share for every two held, with May 29 set as the record date. This move, alongside a Rs 6 dividend and strong Q4 results showing a 26% profit jump, aims to boost share liquidity. The company also plans to raise further capital.

india_trends.title: BOJ keeps rates steady but 3 board members dissent, call for hike
india_trends.summary: The Bank of Japan maintained its current interest rate, but a significant minority on its board pushed for a hike, highlighting worries about inflation fueled by Middle East tensions. This move, while expected, signals growing unease within the central bank regarding rising price pressures. Governor
